productDisplayName: New Hide Unisex Black Antique Passport Holder
description: Style NoteCrafted from soft, genuine leather, this antique passport holder from Newhide is an essential to stay organised during travel. Ensure all your important items are organised and arranged in this piece. Newhide leather breathes, regulates temperature to the ambience, prevents dust penetration and has high ripping resistance. Carry your essentials with ease in this classic holderProduct DetailsBlack passport holder with a zipped closure on one side and a flap on the other sideOne id holder and four card holders on the leftnbsp; with two insert pockets Two insert pockets on the right sideA pen holder in the middleMaterial and CareGenuine leatherRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtSizeDimensions: 21 cm X 11 cmWarranty: 1 year limited warrantyWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
